# Pull Request Checklist

## Summary

- Describe what changed and why.

## Red (Failing Test First)

- Link or paste the failing test evidence before implementation.
- Example: test name + failure output screenshot/log.

## Green (Passing After Fix)

- Link or paste passing test evidence after implementation.
- Include the exact command(s) used.

## Refactor

- Describe refactor done after tests passed.
- If no refactor, explain why.

## Checklist (Required)

- [ ] I added or updated tests for this change.
- [ ] I ran affected tests locally and they passed.
- [ ] I provided Red/Green/Refactor evidence above.
- [ ] I confirm no unrelated changes are included.
